title: Acknowledgements, Delivery Tags, Redelivery, and Effect Ownership · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective delivery ownership and acknowledgement decision table; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in delivery ownership and acknowledgement decision table and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership.
Acknowledge, nack, or reject a delivery exactly once on its owning channel and prevent stale or cross-channel tag use.
Transfer ownership only after the intended durable effect, transactional inbox record, or safely repeatable handoff succeeds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 2384 in a partner publisher using an unroutable changed topic key. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to enforce same-generation, exactly-one terminal acknowledgement after durable effect; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then lower the byte or in-flight budget and preserve upstream rejection evidence. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership.

Inspect the Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff, keep Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use one terminal delivery decision owner to prevent timeout, abort, handler, and shutdown paths from double acknowledging or conflicting.

hints: For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Ack Race Single Owner, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Ack Race Single Owner precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Ack Race Single Owner, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug messaging team handles case 2227 in a partner publisher using an unroutable changed topic key. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to enforce same-generation, exactly-one terminal acknowledgement after durable effect; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then fail the canary and prove older consumers remain compatible during rollback. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use one terminal delivery decision owner to prevent timeout, abort, handler, and shutdown paths from double acknowledging or conflicting.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Ack Race Single Owner, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Calling ack twice is idempotent and safely ignored by RabbitMQ.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
